completed_tasks.name: Add disabled item support to NavigationItem
Update MyCareerApp to use new AppLayout interface

remaining_tasks.name: Integrate analyser from AudioRecorder into InterviewScreen
Test audio-reactive visualizer in interview flow

decisions.decision: LiquidGlassSidebar manages its own mobile state
decisions.rationale: Sidebar component is self-contained with hamburger menu, overlay, and collapse logic - no need for external mobileMenuOpen state

decisions.decision: Audio reactivity via optional analyser parameter
decisions.rationale: Pass AnalyserNode from AudioRecorder to visualizer hook - allows reuse with different audio sources

next_action: Integrate AudioRecorder.getAnalyser() into InterviewScreen and pass to AgentAudioVisualizerAura component
context_notes: Working on design system enhancement (liquid-glass sidebar) and audio-reactive visualizer. Sidebar fully integrated. Audio hook created and visualizer hook updated. Remaining: wire up analyser from InterviewScreen's AudioRecorder to the visualizer component.
